meanings.definition: corrupt morally or by intemperance or sensuality
examples: debauch the young people with wine and women
Socrates was accused of corrupting young men
Do school counselors subvert young children?

meanings.definition: lower in value by increasing the base-metal content
corrupt, debase, or make impure by adding a foreign or inferior substance; often by replacing valuable ingredients with inferior ones
used of conduct; characterized by dishonor
